title: Why Zerodha now wants Groww and Upstox to grow faster
description:
Zerodha is India's biggest stock broker — and SEBI's own rules are now stopping it from growing further. SEBI has a 15% open interest cap on the F&O market, meaning no single broker can hold more than 15% of total active contracts — no matter how good they are. Zerodha has been sitting near that ceiling for almost 5 years. In any other business, being the best means capturing the market. In broking, being the best means hitting a government wall. Now Nikhil Kamath's only path to growth is for competitors like Groww and Upstox to grow bigger — so the total market size expands. India's most powerful broker is rooting for its own competition.
#Shorts #Zerodha #NikhilKamath #SEBI #IndianStockMarket
